# Spss

**Summary**: Statistical software used for calculating LC50 and EC50 values with 95% confidence limits.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] used SPSS to calculate LC50 and EC50 values from toxicity test data.

## Key Results and Findings

- LC50 of local species (Aphanius dispar) exposed to oil dispersant was calculated as 262.9 mgL-1 using SPSS. ([[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018, p. 54]])
